languages.text: Мертвенный холод, нараставший по мере погружения в пропасть, стал ужасающим испытанием для каждого. Он казался дыханием самой смерти, пронизывающим до костей. Лишь суровая закалка бойцов и строжайшая дисциплина позволили избежать ненужных жертв.

traits.locale_text: Волны жара, поднимающиеся из темных внутренностей Музеона, не опаляли, но иссушали. В ошеломляющей духоте любой неосторожный вдох, любое лишнее движение становились пыткой. Лишь суровая закалка бойцов, прошедших через горнило Заркова, строжайшая дисциплина, воспитанная Вольным Торговцем в рядах своих подданных, и точные расчеты, произведенные слугами Омниссии, помогли избежать ненужных жертв.

languages.text: The deathly cold that grew more intense as we delved deeper into the pit was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It felt like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and rigorous discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.
languages.original_text: Мертвенный холод, нараставший по мере погружения в пропасть, стал ужасающим испытанием для каждого. Он казался дыханием самой смерти, пронизывающим до костей. Лишь суровая закалка бойцов и строжайшая дисциплина позволили избежать ненужных жертв.

traits.locale_text: The deathly cold that grew stronger as we delved deeper into the chasm was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It seemed like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and stringent discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.

The deathly cold that grew more intense as we delved deeper into the pit was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It felt like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and rigorous discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.

The waves of heat that rose up from that fathomless pit were not scorching, but drying. In the overwhelming, sweltering heat, any excess movement was akin to torture. Only the fighters' brutal training and stringent discipline made it possible to avoid unnecessary casualties.

The deathly cold that grew stronger as we delved deeper into the chasm was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It seemed like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and stringent discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.

The deathly cold that grew more intense as we delved deeper into the pit was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It felt like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and rigorous discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.

languages.text: 随着我们向深坑不断深入，那死一般的寒意愈发酷烈，宛如死亡本身的刺骨吐息。这对所有人来说都是一场严酷考验。多亏士兵们训练有素，纪律严明，我们才避免了不必要的伤亡。
languages.original_text: The deathly cold that grew more intense as we delved deeper into the pit was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It felt like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and rigorous discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.

traits.locale_text: 随着我们向深坑不断深入，那死一般的寒意愈发酷烈，宛如死亡本身的刺骨吐息。这对所有人来说都是一场严酷考验。多亏士兵们训练有素，纪律严明，我们才避免了不必要的伤亡。

languages.text: El mortífero frío se fue intensificando conforme nos adentrábamos en el pozo, una prueba aterradora para cada uno. Era como el hálito gélido de la misma muerte. Solo el brutal entrenamiento y la rigurosa disciplina de la tropa evitaron que tuviéramos bajas.
languages.original_text: The deathly cold that grew more intense as we delved deeper into the pit was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It felt like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and rigorous discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.

traits.locale_text: El mortífero frío se fue intensificando conforme nos adentrábamos en el pozo, una prueba aterradora para cada uno. Era como el hálito gélido de la misma muerte. Solo el brutal entrenamiento y la rigurosa disciplina de la tropa evitaron que tuviéramos bajas.

languages.text: Le froid glacial, qui s'intensifiait à mesure que nous nous enfoncions dans la fosse, mit nos nerfs à rude épreuve tant il faisait penser au souffle de la mort elle-même. Ce ne fut que grâce à l'entraînement brutal et à la discipline rigoureuse des soldats que des pertes inutiles purent être évitées.
languages.original_text: The deathly cold that grew more intense as we delved deeper into the pit was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It felt like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and rigorous discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.

traits.locale_text: Le froid glacial, qui s'intensifiait à mesure que nous nous enfoncions dans la fosse, mit nos nerfs à rude épreuve tant il faisait penser au souffle de la mort elle-même. Ce ne fut que grâce à l'entraînement brutal et à la discipline rigoureuse des soldats que des pertes inutiles purent être évitées.

languages.text: Çukura indikçe daha da yoğunlaşan ölümcül soğuk, her birimiz için ürkütücü bir sınavdı. Ölümün o insanın kemiklerine işleyen nefesi gibiydi. Gereksiz kayıpları önlememizi sağlayan tek şey, askerlerin o acımasız eğitimi ve sıkı disiplini oldu.
languages.original_text: The deathly cold that grew more intense as we delved deeper into the pit was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It felt like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and rigorous discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.

traits.locale_text: Çukura indikçe daha da yoğunlaşan ölümcül soğuk, her birimiz için ürkütücü bir sınavdı. Ölümün o insanın kemiklerine işleyen nefesi gibiydi. Gereksiz kayıpları önlememizi sağlayan tek şey, askerlerin o acımasız eğitimi ve sıkı disiplini oldu.

languages.text: Die tödliche Kälte, die mit jedem Schritt, den wir tiefer in die Grube vordrangen, intensiver wurde, war eine entsetzliche Prüfung für uns alle. Sie fühlte sich an wie der eiskalte Atem des Todes selbst. Es war allein der brutalen Ausbildung und ehernen Disziplin der Soldaten zu verdanken, dass wir keine unnötigen Verluste erlitten.
languages.original_text: The deathly cold that grew more intense as we delved deeper into the pit was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It felt like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and rigorous discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.

traits.locale_text: Die tödliche Kälte, die mit jedem Schritt, den wir tiefer in die Grube vordrangen, intensiver wurde, war eine entsetzliche Prüfung für uns alle. Sie fühlte sich an wie der eiskalte Atem des Todes selbst. Es war allein der brutalen Ausbildung und ehernen Disziplin der Soldaten zu verdanken, dass wir keine unnötigen Verluste erlitten.

languages.text: 深淵の底から立ち上る熱波は灼熱ではなく、乾いた。圧倒的な暑さの中で、無駄な動きは拷問に等しい。無駄な犠牲を避けるために、戦士たちは厳しい訓練と規律を貫いていた。
languages.original_text: The waves of heat that rose up from that fathomless pit were not scorching, but drying. In the overwhelming, sweltering heat, any excess movement was akin to torture. Only the fighters' brutal training and stringent discipline made it possible to avoid unnecessary casualties.

traits.locale_text: 深淵の底から立ち上る熱波は灼熱ではなく、乾いた。圧倒的な暑さの中で、無駄な動きは拷問に等しい。無駄な犠牲を避けるために、戦士たちは厳しい訓練と規律を貫いていた。
